benefits.description: Libido boost is real and works on brain level (making all women look prettier), different from vasodilators like Viagra/Cialis

side_effects.description: Can change skin tone/race very fast if overdosed. Reports friend who overdid it and became much darker (Arab appearance)

protocol_notes: Warns against typical protocols as they are overdoses. Recommends tiny experimental doses, carefully titrating tan over 3 days between doses. Notes MT2 is still little known and advises extreme caution. Reports no addiction risk.
